stemHtml: Cruising at FL330, you hear "Traffic, traffic" and see an amber circle on your display labelled ↓+8. Which statement is correct?

options.a: Resolution advisory; conflict traffic 800 ft below and climbing.
options.b: Traffic advisory; 800 ft above and pilot must descend.
options.c: Resolution advisory issued; conflict traffic 800 ft above; descend required.
options.d: Traffic advisory; conflict traffic 800 ft above, descending toward your level.
